prompt: Create a finished editorial paper-collage still for a 9:16 image-to-video B-roll clip. Visual proposition: a single large black-and-white halftone AI chat speech-bubble floats in the upper area; a fine thread and a small reverse-pointing arrow run down from behind it and drag out a hidden personal dossier folder that is opening at the bottom, revealing form-grid and record textures plus one small blacked-out silhouette portrait chip — reverse-inferring the private personal record hidden behind a single AI output. Scene: perfectly flat deep-violet paper field (#3B2A57) with subtle uncoated paper fiber. Style: premium editorial stop-motion paper collage; black-and-white halftone photographic cut-outs of the speech-bubble, the thread, the reverse arrow, the opening dossier folder and a small silhouette chip, with selective cream-white and brick-red (#C8451B) colored cardstock accents. Composition: vertical 9:16 locked poster frame; speech-bubble upper-center, dossier lower-center, connected; central subject within the middle 70 percent; generous clean color-field negative space; 3 to 6 large separable paper groups suitable for later assemble-from-empty animation. Materials: visible printed halftone dots, crisp machine-cut edges, thin warm-cream paper keylines, soft low-opacity physical drop shadows. Constraint: the relationship must read instantly — one AI answer bubble on top, a private personal file being pulled open out of hiding beneath it. Avoid: no typography, no readable letters, no numerals, no logos, no watermark, no UI, no subtitles, no glossy 3D, no photoreal environment, no clutter, no realistic recognizable human face.
